question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/service/TransactionExecutionService.java -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: execute()] Can an unprivileged external user trigger a scenario where transactionExecutorFactory.get() returns null (e.g., executor not yet initialized), causing a NullPointerException on executor.execute() that crashes the service and prevents all transaction confirmations?
